items.title: Unsupervised vs supervised data flow
items.mermaid:
flowchart TB
  raw["Unlabeled dataset X"] --> unsup["Unsupervised model"]
  unsup --> struct["Discovered structure"]
  struct --> c["Clusters"]
  struct --> d["Low-dim embedding"]
  struct --> a["Anomaly scores"]
  labeled["Labeled dataset X y"] --> sup["Supervised model"]
  sup --> pred["Predicted labels y_hat"]
items.caption: Unsupervised learning maps unlabeled inputs to discovered structure; supervised learning maps inputs to predictions of provided labels.

items.title: Major unsupervised task families
items.mermaid:
flowchart LR
  ul["Unsupervised learning"] --> cl["Clustering"]
  ul --> dr["Dimensionality reduction"]
  ul --> de["Density estimation"]
  ul --> ad["Anomaly detection"]
  cl --> out1["Group assignments"]
  dr --> out2["Compressed coordinates"]
  ad --> out3["Outlier ranking"]
items.caption: The unsupervised paradigm spans several problem families that share the absence of external labels.
